text: Code reviews are a vital part of software development. When developers check each other's code, they can catch bugs early, before the code goes into production. This saves time and money because fixing problems later is much harder. Beyond finding errors, code reviews also encourage knowledge sharing within the team. Team members learn new techniques and different ways of solving problems. This helps everyone improve their skills. Ultimately, code reviews raise the overall quality of the codebase and strengthen the team. By working together through reviews, teams build more reliable software and grow as developers.
